title: MC but Better
description: Mods, Shaders, and Resource Packs I think will make Minecraft better. Supports Minecraft version 1.21.8 (1.21.9 support coming soon!)
body:
# Have a Better Minecraft Experience with MC but Better!

### Heres what it does!
MC but Better attempts to give you a better Minecraft experience with tons of quality of life features, like shaders, zooming, higher gamma, playing with friends, having more blocks to build with, fully custom world generation, new biomes, new structures, and so much more! If you don't like a certain feature in this modpack feel free to disable or add any mod / resource / shader pack you want! Thank you to [Vanilla Perfected](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla-perfected), and [Better Minecraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/better-mc-fabric-bmc2) for the inspiration!
# Downloading Vanilla Tweaks

### What is Vanilla Tweaks?
Vanilla Tweaks is a collection of resource packs that lets you choose the changes you want to make to your game, most of these features are quality of life and bug fixes, there are a variety of changes to be made to your game like makes ores have borders and much more.

### How To Download Vanilla Tweaks!
Vanilla Tweaks is not in MC but Better by default because its's not on modrinth to Download Vanilla Tweaks Visit the site [vanillatweaks.net](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
and pick the changes you want to be made! Alternatively you can use the mod VTdownloader To Download a Vanilla Tweaks Resource Pack Directly ingame, just press the Download VT Resource Pack Button to download a pack and from there you can choose the changes you want to be made (VTDownloader is in MC But Better by default). But I recommend to just download it manully.
